review_summary.college_name: Sir Visvesvaraya Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The faculty is good, there are good placements in 2021, nice infrastructure and advanced facilities.

content.Placements: According to my college records, more than 50% were placed in 2023. The highest package offered was 7 LPA; the average package was 4.5 LPA; and the lowest was 3.2 LPA. The top retailers are Infosys, TCS, WNS, and L&T. Around 47 students did internships at the college, which were provided by Shivandu Infotech. The roles offered are data analysts.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities were mostly good but needed more development as per the area our institute has; otherwise, classrooms are very nice with projectors, computer systems and for safety, fire extinguishers on the ceiling. The facilities provided in the hostel were decent, but having proper security still needs more development. The mess is not so good, the canteen is below average, and the medical facilities are great. As there is a hospital on our campus, there is a lot of support for sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good in all aspects.

content.Placements: Around 20% of students got placed in our course. Around 2-3 companies visit our college to recruit students. The average salary package offered is 3.60 LPA. Around 2-3, students got placed off campus. The highest salary package offered is 7.20 LPA. Almost 60% of students got internships. Top roles offered are developer and software tester.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. The hostel is good. Labs, classrooms, and library are good. The campus maintains good discipline, with separate hostels for girls and boys. Security is well-maintained. Medical facilities are available in our college. A playground is available in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: One of the best engineering college in Nashik.

content.Placements: From my batch, 8-10 students were placed in different companies. For Mechanical, the highest Package offered - 5 LPA (IT Company) the lowest Package offered - 3.2 LPA (JSW) Top Recruiting companies were: 1) JSW (Jindal Saw Limited Nashik) 2) KSB Pumps Pune 3) Technoforge (visits every year) 4) Technoforce 5) Praz Industries 6) Some IT Companies also visit for hiring mechanical engineers. 7) Other small scale agricultural and pharmeceutical having MOU with SVIT also visit. As such, for our batch, there wasn't any internship provided by college but right now they are providing mandatory internships to Final year students so as to improve their practical exposure to industrial processes and equipments. Top Roles offered were: 1) Graduate Engineer Trainee 2) Production Engineer 3) Junior Design Engineer .

reviews.review_text: The college is in the very beautiful area of Nashik. The infrastructure is also very good. Even we mechanical engineering students have a separate building for mechanical branch. There are canteen facilities available in the college which is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is an awesome college and is located in a natural scenario.
reviews.review_text: Our college is spread over 73 acres and is surrounded by hills. There is a Wi-Fi facility throughout the college. Our college is located in Nashik-Pune, Mumbai-Shirdi highway and is about 12 km away from Nashik central railway station. As it is away from the city, the atmosphere is free from pollution. There are hostel facilities for both girls and boys. There will be good food and mess arrangements.

reviews.review_heading: Placements were not that good. Otherwise, our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms here are good, and the library is well maintained. There are very many departments and courses like mechanical, computer, chemical engineering, etc. The hostel is very well maintained, and they take special care for the food served in the hostel as well as canteen. The medical facility is poor, and sports and games facilities are average.

reviews.review_heading: I am moderately satisfied, and our college has nice faculty members and the environment.
reviews.review_text: Our college has 4 buildings and one hostel. The main building includes electrical, chemical, mechanical, computer and IT engineering departments, including labs. Another building includes a seminar hall, E&TC department, principal office and MBA department. One is building is assigned separately for workshops, which is fully equipped with all the necessary tools.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges ever.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides high-speed Wi-Fi facilities on the campus as well as the hostel. There are all well-developed departmental labs. Our college also has a huge central library with IEEE login, and there are smart digital classrooms. Our college provides the best hostel at affordable fees, and there is a separate wing according to the year in which students are pursuing. Our college provides doctor appointment regularly in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: The college does not provide placements and has very poor management.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is better. It is too old, and no renovation happened there. The college does not provide Wi-Fi facility for students. Canteen facility is poor. There is no medical facility on an urgent basis. There is no management between principal and any other teaching staff members, and I am very disappointed with this.

reviews.review_heading: College with good infrastructure and good faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The college has a spacious library. The library is the best, and there are many books available for students. Labs are well-equipped, and classrooms, corridors, canteen and hostel are kept clean. Gardens which are present around the college are well maintained. The college also has a good mess for hostel students.

reviews.review_heading: SVIT is a very good college for education.
reviews.review_text: The academic buildings are good. The campus environment is mesmerising. All the academic buildings have good connectivity. Wi-Fi facility is good, but its speed is moderate. The central library is well-maintained, and also each department has a library for students. The medical and sports facilities are good. The college students take part in various competitions like sports, project presentation, paperwork etc.

reviews.review_heading: SVIT is college which provides you quality teaching in affordable price.
reviews.review_text: That's the main thing I want to describe here. Infrastructure is very cool and surrounding atmosphere also. Classrooms are big in size also fully furnished labs present. Though college is in rural area but overall infrastructure is superb. Wi-Fi facility also available with good speed. Canteen food is average in quality. Hostel rooms are also good but in some rooms there is lack of beds and cupboards.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: In the next couple of years, one of the best colleges will be for campus placements.

content.Placements: In my college, above 80 percent of placements are done in the last academic year. Especially in my electronics communication department, 90 percent of all cleared students are placed. The highest package is 12 LPA, the lowest is 2.5 LPA, and the average is 4 LPA to 4.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are IBM, Infosys, Tata, etc. Internships are also good. 75% percent of students got internships. The top roles in our course are embedded systems, VLSI design, and analog communication.
content.Infrastructure: In recent times, the facilities for students have been greatly increased, providing Wi-Fi labs, equipment in labs, and advanced books in labs. I am a 2nd-year student, especially a hostel student. Morning food is very nice, afternoon food is not upto mark, and evening food is also good. The medical facilities are also available in the hostel. Recently, the college also conducted a cricket tournament.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college review by a student.

content.Placements: 40% of students are placed in this college. 5-6 LPC can be expected in the placements. Qualcomm, Intel, Microchip, Samsung can be recruited for my course. Physical design, testing engineer, RTL designer, code developer, chip designer, etc. are the top roles of my course.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities in this college are nice. The library, labs, classrooms, furniture, digital classes, digital library, projector rooms, etc. are provided in this college. Every year, sports are conducted and competitions such as rangoli, fancy dress, etc. are conducted.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of Anu Bose Institute of Technology.

content.Placements: Almost 60% of students got placed in our college. The average salary package offered is 3 LPA. The placement cell is moderate. It should be improved. They should provide more opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is not available in our college. The overall infrastructure needs improvement. Our college has a spacious playground, there is no time for sports. Medical facilities are available on our campus.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are not much experienced. They are helpful. They clear our doubts. Semester exams are not much difficult compared to other colleges. The course curriculum is designed easily. It provides good knowledge.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good infrastructure, a good environment, and good faculty members.

content.Placements: The placement rate is 70%. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 4 LPA. Top recruiters are Infosys, Wipro, Capgemini, and Cognizant. About 50% of students got internships. The top role offered is IC designing. We did internships at embedded systems-related companies. VLSI-related companies also conduct campus drives. Students can work as control system engineers in railways. There were good placements in 2020.
content.Infrastructure: It has very good laboratories. Wi-Fi is always available. Digital classrooms, a central library, and a digital library are available. There is a healthy environment. The hostel provides rooms and hygienic food. Medical facilities are always available. It has a huge playground. We play sports in the evening. Every evening, yoga and meditation are conducted.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mining Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members were very good at teaching. The college offers many roles for your success.

content.Placements: Nearly 60 to 80% of the students got placed. The highest salary offered was Rs. 40,000 per month and the lowest salary offered was Rs. 20,000 per month. Companies like Bajaj Limited and google are the top recruiters of our college. The top role offered to the students was general manager of the department. In our course, the highest salary offered was Rs. 50,000 per month and the lowest salary offered was nearly Rs. 40,000 per month. About 87% of the students got an internship.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities of our college are very good for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: As I mentioned above, we have a decent pass percentage, and overall we have lots of enjoyment.

content.Placements: We have better placement options. It is all about personal interest. Our college provides placement offers. The highest package is 9 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA, so this is based on student interest. I love my college, and we make our college standard.
content.Infrastructure: The sources are good, and decent infrastructure is provided by the college. The labs are decent, recently, we have launched an artificial intelligence lab, so that was working decent. In the library, we have more than a thousand books for our reference.

faqs.question: Is NMAM Institute of Technology hard to get?
faqs.answer: Generally, NMAM Institute of Technology does not have very high stipulation when it comes to admissions, albeit the several degree courses it may admit may be moderately competitive. The KCET or COMEDK entrance examination scores are usually the requirement to attend undergraduate classes like B.Tech. If a student wants to pursue his or her education from the KCET then the general range of the rank is between 10000-20000 depending on the branch such as Computer Science Engineering or others, where as for the other branches more rank is required. Regarding COMEDK, students preferred ranks are between 5000 to 12000 for admission to the best branches. The institute also looks into the academic performance in the qualification exams. Its acceptance rate is about 60-70%, so it is not very selective, yet, the prospective student has to engage in constant studying and preparing for entrance exams.

faqs.question: How can I take admission to NMAM Institute of Technology for MCA?
faqs.answer: To secure MCA admission at NMAM Institute of Technology:Step 1: Know Your Opponent – 50% in graduation, 10+2 pass with Mathematics.Step 2: Apply Online- Download application form from institute’s website and fill it.Step 3: KFIT KMAT/PGCET – KMAT/PGCET entrance exam.Step 4: Counseling – In accordance with eligibility, attend counseling meetings.Step 5: Document Verification – Pay fees, Verify documents.Key Requirements:- UG aggregate: 50%- 10+2 with Mathematics- Entrance exams: KMAT/PGCET- Counseling: Merit-based- Fees: Rs 140000 – Rs 350000 per annum.
